DocumentStorageService - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.service
DocumentStorageService handles storage and retrieval of documents (e.g., PDFs, JPGs, PNGs) associated with transactions.

DonorsPanel - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.panels
DonorsPanel displays a list of donors along with their donation data.
DonorsPanel() - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.panels.DonorsPanel
Constructs the DonorsPanel.
DonorsPanel.Donor - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.panels
Donor represents a donor with an ID, name, total donation amount, and last donation date.
DonorsPanel.DonorService - Interface in nonprofitbookkeeping.panels
DonorService defines the API for retrieving donor data.
